scenario: DE→EN · language switch inside one call

turns.say: Guten Tag! Kann ich meinen kleinen Hund mitbringen?
turns.transcript: Guten Tag, kann ich meinen kleinen Hund mitbringen?
turns.reply: Guten Tag! Ja, Sie dürfen Ihren kleinen Hund mitbringen. Es fällt eine Reinigungspauschale von 15 Euro an. Möchten Sie ein Zimmer für Ihren Aufenthalt reservieren?

facts.pets: Pets allowed if kept off the furniture; €15.00 cleaning fee.

turns.say: Thank you! And is there parking at the hotel?
turns.transcript: Thank you. And is there parking at the hotel?
turns.reply: Yes, we have a private parking lot right at the hotel, free of charge for all guests. Would you like me to check room availability for your stay?

parking_bikes.car: Private parking lot, free of charge for all hotel guests, just steps from the rooms.
parking_bikes.bicycle: Secure bike storage with charging power included ('Your bike sleeps safely — with power included').
